description: Ten-seed confirmation of the provisional 36-vehicle A1 mechanism baseline against the 24-vehicle tight-supply sensitivity.

classification_rules.competition_event: at least one ride-hailing capacity failure in the seed-weather run
classification_rules.collapse_event: at least one final transport_unmet activity after fallback
classification_rules.candidate_rule: highest fleet total with stable competition in at least one weather and below the collapse seed-share threshold

formal_recalibration_dimensions: availability of cross-zone empty pickup or repositioning
experimental_supply_scaling.interpretation: The 0.18 ratio is an effective conserved mechanism-pool starting point, not real vehicles per resident or a Shanghai fleet estimate.

scope_notes: The ten-seed run confirms robustness; it does not retune the A1 behavior coefficients.
All paired fleet levels share Agents, activities, OD, weather and dispatch priorities within a seed.
The 36-vehicle result is evaluated using failure magnitude, fallback and necessary completion as well as the automatic competition label.
Formal Agent Society runs must compare a proportional starting pool with reality-anchored and scale-sensitivity pools.
